calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Khaldoun Baghdadi, Esq. for Petitioner: Patrice Malone Piskinski present as guardian ad litem for Ashley Pisinski and Spencer Pisinski, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Reimbursement of legal/Costs in the amount of $7,733.09
Attorney's fees: $46,112.89
The Balance of the settlement proceeds to each minor, for future structured payments, shall be made in accourd with the terms set forth in the Petition and in Attachment 6.b.(2) in the Order.
Order signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
